task_description: Add a DynamoDB table (SleepAudioMetadataTable) for storing audio pipeline metadata and extend the Step Functions state machine with DynamoDB PutItem/UpdateItem tasks for input/output handling. Follow strict TDD with tests first.

verification.summary: All 18 tests pass (5 CdkBaseTest + 5 StepFunctionsTest + 8 DynamoDbMetadataTest). Build compiles cleanly. Tests verify DynamoDB table properties (key schema, billing mode, PITR, retention policy), state machine DynamoDB task integration (PutItem/UpdateItem in definition), and IAM permissions. Each test would fail if the corresponding construct or configuration were removed.
